examples: She tried to smother her anger and help them resolve their conflicts.
Too much snow, for example, can smother trees, and avalanches and snow creep can damage or destroy them.
He tried to smother the flames with a blanket.
Whether they fund their waste through taxing, borrowing or printing, they smother the private sector.
Christ, I don't want to smother feedback, even if it hurts a little bit.
